executives.name: Alex Gorsky
executives.background: Mr. Gorsky is the former Chairman and CEO of Johnson & Johnson, where he served as Chairman and CEO from 2012 to 2021 and Executive Chairman in 2022.

executives.name: Daniel Pinto
executives.background: Mr. Pinto has been President and Chief Operating Officer since January 2022. He was Co-President and Co-Chief Operating Officer from 2018 to 2021 and CEO of the Corporate & Investment Bank from 2014 to 2024.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Dominic Caruso
executives.background: Former Chief Financial Officer of Johnson & Johnson.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Marillyn Hewson
executives.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of Lockheed Martin Corporation. Director since 2021.

executives.name: Nadja West
executives.background: Retired Lieutenant General in the United States Army and 44th Surgeon General of the U.S. Army.
